description: Verify all React Native SDK features work correctly using iOS simulator automation

userStories.title: Verify app builds and launches
userStories.description: Ensure the React Native example app builds without errors and launches on iOS simulator
verification: Run: cd packages/sdk-react-native/example && bun run ios (or verify already running)
Use ios-simulator: python scripts/app_launcher.py --launch com.q9labs.chalk-example
Take screenshot and verify HomeScreen shows 'Chalk Video' title
Verify 'Create & Join Room' button is visible

userStories.title: Verify navigation to PreCallScreen
userStories.description: Test that tapping Create & Join Room navigates to PreCallScreen with camera preview
verification: Use ios-simulator: python scripts/navigator.py --find-text 'Create' --tap
Take screenshot of PreCallScreen
Verify 'Join Room' title is shown
Verify permissions show 'granted' for camera and microphone
Verify 'Join Call' button is visible and enabled (green, not dimmed)

userStories.title: Verify CallScreen UI and controls
userStories.description: Navigate to CallScreen and verify all UI elements render correctly
verification: Use ios-simulator: python scripts/navigator.py --find-text 'Join Call' --tap
Wait 2 seconds for CallScreen to load
Take screenshot of CallScreen
Verify room ID is shown in header
Verify status badge shows either 'Demo Mode' or 'Connecting' or 'Live'
Verify participant count badge is visible
Verify reaction buttons (thumbs up, heart, etc) are visible
Verify control bar shows Mute, Stop/Start, Raise, Leave buttons

userStories.title: Verify mute/unmute control works
userStories.description: Test that tapping the mute button toggles audio state
verification: Take screenshot showing current mute button label
Use ios-simulator: python scripts/navigator.py --find-text 'Mute' --tap OR --find-text 'Unmute' --tap
Take screenshot showing button label changed (Mute <-> Unmute)
Verify the button state toggled successfully

userStories.title: Verify video toggle control works
userStories.description: Test that tapping the camera button toggles video state
verification: Take screenshot showing current camera button label (Start or Stop)
Use ios-simulator: python scripts/navigator.py --find-text 'Start' --tap OR --find-text 'Stop' --tap
Take screenshot showing button label changed
Verify the button state toggled successfully

userStories.title: Verify hand raise control works
userStories.description: Test that tapping the hand raise button toggles hand state
verification: Take screenshot showing current hand button label (Raise or Lower)
Use ios-simulator: python scripts/navigator.py --find-text 'Raise' --tap OR --find-text 'Lower' --tap
Take screenshot showing button label changed (Raise <-> Lower)
Verify the button state toggled successfully

userStories.title: Verify reaction sending works
userStories.description: Test that tapping a reaction emoji triggers floating animation
verification: Use ios-simulator: Tap the thumbs up reaction button
Quickly take screenshot to capture floating emoji animation
Verify no crash or error occurs
Metro logs should not show errors related to reactions

userStories.title: Verify leave call and return to home
userStories.description: Test that tapping Leave returns to HomeScreen
verification: Use ios-simulator: python scripts/navigator.py --find-text 'Leave' --tap
Wait 1 second for navigation
Take screenshot
Verify HomeScreen is shown with 'Chalk Video' title
Verify can join again (Create & Join Room button visible)

userStories.title: Verify type checking passes
userStories.description: Run type checker to ensure no TypeScript errors in SDK
verification: Run: bun run check-types
Verify all packages pass type checking
No TypeScript errors should be reported

userStories.title: Verify SDK exports are correct
userStories.description: Ensure all expected hooks and components are exported from the SDK
verification: Check packages/sdk-react-native/src/index.ts exports
Verify exports include: ChalkProvider, useChalk, useRoom, useMedia, useParticipants, useLocalStream, usePermissions, useDevices, useInteractions, VideoView, ParticipantTile, AudioSession
Run: bun run build in packages/sdk-react-native to verify build succeeds
